name: David Garofalo
background: Mr. Garofalo has served as our Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer since August 2020. He has over 30 years of experience in the metals and mining industry. Previously, he served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Goldcorp Inc. from 2016 to 2019 and as President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay Minerals Inc. from 2010 to 2016.

commpanies.name: Gold Royalty Corp.
commpanies.title_or_role: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer
